allow.description: Canonical command ids allowed as MCP tools beyond the generated defaults (global mcp.allow).

deny.description: Canonical command ids denied as MCP tools; deny wins over allow (global mcp.deny).

maxConcurrent.description: Positive cap on concurrent MCP tool calls (global mcp.maxConcurrent; default 4).
maxConcurrent.title: positive

tooling.description: Project resolved app tooling tasks as MCP tools by default (global mcp.tooling).
